name: POWELL INDUSTRIES INC
summary: Powell Industries, Inc. is a Delaware corporation founded in 1947 that develops, designs, manufactures, and services custom-engineered equipment and systems for distributing, controlling, and monitoring electrical energy. Products include integrated power control room substations, E-Houses, switchgear, motor control centers, medium-voltage circuit breakers, and monitoring systems. The company primarily serves oil and gas, petrochemical, electric utility, and commercial/industrial markets, with operations headquartered in Houston, Texas and international subsidiaries in Canada, the UK, and internationally.

products.name: Integrated Power Control Room Substations (PCRs)
products.description: Custom-engineered modular substations for electrical power distribution and control.

products.name: Electrical Houses (E-Houses)
products.description: Custom-engineered modular electrical equipment enclosures for industrial applications.

products.name: Distribution Switchgear and Control Gear
products.description: Traditional and arc-resistant medium-voltage switchgear for power distribution and protection.

products.name: Medium-Voltage Circuit Breakers
products.description: Vacuum circuit breakers for medium-voltage electrical systems up to 38,000 volts.

products.name: Motor Control Centers
products.description: Assemblies for controlling and protecting electric motors in industrial environments.

products.name: Monitoring and Control Communications Systems
products.description: Systems for monitoring and controlling electrical energy distribution and equipment.

products.name: Switches and Bus Duct Systems
products.description: Electrical switching and bus duct components for power distribution systems.

products.name: SCADA Remote Terminal Units (RTUs)
products.description: RTUs for electrical substation control and automation in generation, transmission, and distribution, via Remsdaq acquisition.

products.name: Spare Parts and Retrofit Components
products.description: Replacement and retrofit parts for existing and obsolete switchgear systems.

products.name: Field Service and Commissioning
products.description: Inspection, installation, commissioning, modification, and repair services for electrical systems.

partnerships.description: Powell develops channels to electrical markets through OEM arrangements.
Products and services sold through EPC firms on behalf of end users.
